skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered video creation agent that produces short videos (5-120 seconds) for product ads, social media content, brand videos, and explainers.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: The Pexo AI Video Agent is a legitimate video generation CLI tool. Static analysis detected 534 patterns including shell command usage, network access, and credential handling. All findings are legitimate API client behavior - the tool requires PEXO_API_KEY authentication and makes API calls to pexo.ai for video generation. The CRITICAL heuristic finding about dangerous combinations is a false positive - the combination of code execution, network access, and credential access is expected for any external API client. No malicious behavior detected.

critical_findings.title: False Positive: Heuristic Detection of Dangerous Combination
critical_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged '[HEURISTIC] DANGEROUS COMBINATION: Code execution + Network + Credential access' as CRITICAL. This is a false positive - the combination of shell commands, network API calls, and API key authentication is expected behavior for a legitimate API client CLI tool. All network calls go to the official Pexo API service at pexo.ai. No malicious behavior detected.
critical_findings.confidence_reasoning: The heuristic flagged the legitimate combination of API client patterns. The SKILL.md shows this is a video generation tool requiring PEXO_API_KEY authentication to call the pexo.ai API service - this is standard API client behavior.

critical_findings.title: False Positive: Windows SAM Database Detection
critical_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged 'Windows SAM database' at SKILL.md:43 as CRITICAL sensitive data access. This is a false positive - the actual line contains 'You MUST reply to the user in the SAME language they use' where the word 'SAME' or 'MUST' triggered an incorrect SAM (Security Account Manager) database heuristic.
critical_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line 43 contains language instruction text with no connection to Windows system files. The heuristic incorrectly matched partial strings.

medium_findings.title: Shell Commands in Documentation
medium_findings.description: Documentation files (SETUP-CHECKLIST.md, TROUBLESHOOTING.md) contain shell command examples with backtick syntax shown for user reference. These are documentation examples, not executable code. The actual shell scripts use hardcoded commands without user input injection vectors.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The backtick syntax appears in markdown documentation as examples. Actual shell scripts use hardcoded commands with no user input passed to shell execution.

medium_findings.title: Config File Access for API Credentials
medium_findings.description: The skill accesses ~/.pexo/config to read PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL. This is legitimate credential handling for an API client tool. The skill does not exfiltrate credentials - it reads local config to authenticate with the Pexo API.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard credential loading pattern for CLI API clients. Credentials are read from local config and used only for authentication with the documented Pexo service.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance in Doctor Script
low_findings.description: The pexo-doctor.sh script performs system checks (OS type, installed tools, network connectivity). This is legitimate diagnostic functionality for a CLI tool to verify prerequisites before API usage.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Diagnostic scripts commonly check system requirements. This is expected for a developer tool that requires specific runtime dependencies.

content.user_title: Create AI-powered short videos for marketing
content.value_statement: Creating professional marketing videos requires expensive equipment, video editing skills, and significant time. This skill connects Claude with Pexo AI to automatically generate short videos (5-120 seconds) for product ads, social media, and brand content.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) from text prompts using AI
Create product ads, social media clips, and brand videos
Upload and incorporate user assets (images) into videos
Receive AI-generated video output with download link
Relay user requests directly to professional video AI agent
limitations: Requires PEXO_API_KEY for Pexo AI service authentication
Video generation time depends on Pexo AI service processing
Output quality depends on Pexo AI service capabilities
Only generates short-form content (up to 120 seconds)

use_cases.title: Product marketing videos
use_cases.description: Generate promotional videos for products with AI-generated scripts, shots, transitions, and music.

use_cases.title: Social media content
use_cases.description: Create short clips optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts with various aspect ratios.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Quick video prototyping
use_cases.description: Rapidly prototype video concepts and pitches without requiring video editing software or skills.

prompt_templates.title: Basic video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I need a video for [product/service description]
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple request for any type of promotional video

prompt_templates.title: Social media video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a short video for [platform] about [topic or product]

prompt_templates.title: Product ad with assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a product video for [product name] using the uploaded image

prompt_templates.title: Brand story video
prompt_templates.prompt: I want an explainer video about [topic] for [audience]

output_examples.input: Create a product video for my new coffee brand
output: Video generation started. Pexo will create a professional short video with AI-generated script, shots, and music.

output_examples.input: Make an Instagram Reel about our summer sale
output: Your social media video is ready with trending music and transitions.

best_practices: Provide clear, specific video topics or product descriptions for better AI-generated content
Let Pexo AI handle creative decisions - it specializes in cinematography and storytelling
Upload relevant product images when available for more personalized video generation
anti_patterns: Do not specify technical details like duration, aspect ratio, or style unless the user explicitly requests them
Do not add creative suggestions - Pexo AI has professional video expertise
Do not forward vague requests back to the user without passing them to Pexo first

faq.question: What do I need to use this skill?
faq.answer: You need a PEXO_API_KEY from pexo.ai and basic configuration in ~/.pexo/config.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Video generation time varies based on complexity and Pexo AI service load, typically a few minutes.

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: Videos are 5-120 seconds with support for 16:9 (YouTube), 9:16 (TikTok/Instagram), and 1:1 (Instagram) aspect ratios.

faq.question: Can I use my own images in the videos?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upload images and they will be incorporated into the generated video.

faq.question: What happens if the request is vague?
faq.answer: Pexo AI will ask clarifying questions about the video you want to create.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to use?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill only calls the official Pexo AI API and does not store or transmit data to other services.
